entries.questionText: With the help of a diagram, explain how reduced availability of credit from banks may lead to increased unemployment.
entries.studentAnswer: [Handwritten script provided as images in chat; see teacher notes for summary]

teacherReference.notes: Teacher provided range 6-7/9; stored midpoint 7 for calibration. Structure and chains improved vs prior script; precision still needs tightening.

ao1.strength: Definitions of reduced availability of credit are present and relevant.
ao1.improvement: Could include a more precise definition of credit availability.

ao2.strength: Application to aggregate demand and firm investment is relevant.
ao2.improvement: More direct reference to the context or extract would strengthen application.

ao3.strength: Analysis of the mechanism linking credit availability to unemployment is logical.
ao3.improvement: Could develop further with more distinct chains of reasoning or a diagram.

ao4.strength: Limited evaluation present, not central to the response.

section_focus.note: Strengthen extract/data integration in each paragraph for higher AO2/AO3 quality.

entries.questionText: Evaluate the view that increasing taxation is the best way to reduce a budget deficit.
entries.studentAnswer: [Handwritten script provided as images in chat; see teacher notes for summary]

teacherReference.notes: Teacher provided range 15-17/25; stored midpoint 16 for calibration. Stronger than previous script with clearer structure and broader evaluation; precision still needs tightening.

ao1.strength: Some relevant terminology is used, but definitions are vague.
ao1.improvement: More precise definitions of key terms like 'budget deficit' and 'aggregate demand' are needed.

ao2.strength: Some contextual application is present, but it is not well integrated with the extract.
ao2.improvement: Integrate specific data or examples from the extract to strengthen application.

ao3.strength: Basic analysis is present, but chains of reasoning are underdeveloped.
ao3.improvement: Develop more detailed chains of reasoning linking taxation to budget deficit reduction and economic impacts.

ao4.strength: Some evaluation is attempted, but it is not central to the argument.
ao4.improvement: Integrate evaluation throughout the essay rather than just in the conclusion.

section_focus.note: Strengthen extract/data integration in each paragraph for higher AO2/AO3 quality.
